title: Science essentials
description: Useful words for research, discovery, and scientific progress.

items.example: Scientific discovery has changed the way we live.

items.meaning: to do a careful scientific study
items.example: Universities carry out research in many important fields.

items.meaning: supported by facts, data, or research
items.example: Public health policy should be evidence-based.
Science helps society make progress in medicine and energy.

items.meaning: a real use for an idea or discovery
items.example: Some discoveries are exciting but have no practical application yet.

items.meaning: to help people as a whole
items.example: Research funding should focus on projects that benefit society.
